description: pierre cardin's Emotion deodorant for men has a fresh, spicy oriental fragrance which sprung from the juniper berry to become a “gin and tonic”. It also features refreshing top notes of bergamot, grapefruit and hotter middle notes of ginger, anis and cloves. Additional notes include mandarin, florals, sandalwood and vetiver.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
